title: pultenaea flexilis var. altissima
intro: Pultenaea flexilis var. altissima, also known as tall bush-pea or tall pultenaea, is a variety of flowering plant native to the eastern coast of Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Pultenaea flexilis var. altissima include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
